turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling tech support, this is Taylor. What's going on?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Before we troubleshoot, this call may be recorded for quality and training.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me verify you first. What name is the account under?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Yeah, the registered email is my usual one and the name matches.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I can't log in, it says my password is wrong but it isn't.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. First, can you tell me what you've already tried?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Try restarting the router and give it about a minute to come back.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, hang on, I'm doing that now.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, hang on, I'm doing that now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Looks like that fixed it. I'll note the case in case it returns. Anything else?
